ground_truth.title: Pro Bono Legal Services for Clients
ground_truth.main_content: The State Bar of Nevada supports the promotion of access to justice in Nevada through the delivery of legal services to those in need. If you are in need of legal assistance, but cannot afford a lawyer, a Nevada legal aid provider or pro bono legal services may be available to you. Consult this Legal Resources Directory Brochure for more information or contact one of the legal service providers listed below. Attorneys:  To take a case or participate in an Ask-A-Lawyer complete the Pro Bono Volunteer Form. NORTHERN NEVADA Volunteer Attorneys for Rural Nevadans (VARN) Address: 412 West John Street, Suite C, Carson City, Nevada 89703 Phone: 775.883.8278 Website: varn.org Northern Nevada Legal Aid Address: 299 S. Arlington Ave. Reno, Nevada 89501 Phone: 775.329.2727 Website: www.nnlegalaid.org Washoe County Law Library – “Lawyer in the Library Program” Make an appointment to speak to a volunteer lawyer. Address: 75 Court St., Room 101, Reno, Nevada 89501 Phone: 775.328.3250 Website: Law Library – Washoecourts SOUTHERN NEVADA Legal Aid Center of Southern Nevada Address: 725 E. Charleston Blvd., Las Vegas, Nevada 89104 Phone: 702.386.1070 Website: lacsn.org Southern Nevada Senior Law Program Address: 7650 W. Sahara Ave., Las Vegas, Nevada 89117 Phone: 702.229.6596 Website: Southern Nevada Senior Law Program STATEWIDE Nevada Legal Services (Statewide offices) Website: nevadalegalservices.org Las Vegas Office: Address: 701 E. Bridger Ave., Ste. 400, Las Vegas, NV 89101 Phone: 702.386.0404 Reno Office: Address: 449 S. Virginia Street, Reno, NV 89501 Phone: 775.284.3491 ext. 218 Veterans and military service members/military spouses only: Nevada Attorney General Office of Military Legal Assistance Phone: 775.687.2140 Email: [email protected] Website: OMLA Home Template (nv.gov) Contact:  Dawn R. Jensen Find legal self-help resources. For those not income-eligible for legal aid, you may use the State Bar of Nevada’s Lawyer Referral Service.
with: The State Bar of Nevada supports the promotion of access to justice in Nevada through the delivery of legal services to those in need.
If you are in need of legal assistance, but cannot afford a lawyer, a Nevada legal aid provider or pro bono legal services may be available to you.
Consult this Legal Resources Directory Brochure for more information or contact one of the legal service providers listed below.
Attorneys:  To take a case or participate in an Ask-A-Lawyer complete the Pro Bono Volunteer Form.
For those not income-eligible for legal aid, you may use the State Bar of Nevada’s Lawyer Referral Service.
